log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Giff — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ 1/1 targets affected.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Giff — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Giff — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Giff — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 34 damage. Giff — Unarmored Caster HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 9 damage. Giff — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Giff — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Giff — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Giff — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Giff — Unarmored Caster HP: 7/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Giff — Unarmored Caster HP: -9/67
